parameters.query: INSERT INTO sa_leads (first_name, last_name, email, domain, service_area, message, status) VALUES ($1,$2,$3,$4,$5,$6,'pending_research') RETURNING id

parameters.name: messages
parameters.value: ={{ [{role:'system',content:"You are a business intelligence researcher. Return ONLY a valid JSON object \u2014 no preamble, no explanation, no markdown. Your entire response must be pure JSON starting with { and ending with }. Fields: summary (2-3 paragraphs), industry, size, funding_stage, key_products, recent_news."},{role:'user',content:'Research the company at domain: '+$('Webhook').item.json.body.email.split('@').pop()+'. Contact: '+$('Webhook').item.json.body.first_name+' '+$('Webhook').item.json.body.last_name+'. Service: '+$('Webhook').item.json.body.service_area+'. Message: '+$('Webhook').item.json.body.message+'. Focus on: business model, size, recent news, tech stack, leadership.'}] }}

parameters.query: UPDATE sa_leads SET company_research=$1, status='research_complete', research_completed_at=NOW() WHERE id=$2

options.queryReplacement: ={{ (() => { const raw = $json.choices[0].message.content; const m = raw.match(/```(?:json)?\s*([\s\S]*?)\s*```/); let s = m ? m[1].trim() : raw.trim(); try { s = JSON.stringify(JSON.parse(s)); } catch(e) { s = s.split('\n').join('\\n').split('\r').join('\\r').split('\t').join('\\t'); } return [s, $('Parse & Save Lead to PG').item.json.id]; })() }}

parameters.name: messages
parameters.value:
={{ [{role:'system',content:"You are a senior business advisor at Sovereign Advisory. Return ONLY a valid JSON object — no preamble, no explanation, no markdown. Your entire response must be pure JSON starting with { and ending with }. Fields: summary (string, 2-3 paragraphs), approach (string, 1-2 paragraphs), conversation_starters (array of 3 strings), questions (array of 3 strings), scenarios (array of 3 strings)."},{role:'user',content:'Lead:
Name: '+$('Webhook').item.json.body.first_name+' '+$('Webhook').item.json.body.last_name+'
Email: '+$('Webhook').item.json.body.email+'
Domain: '+$('Webhook').item.json.body.email.split('@').pop()+'
Service: '+$('Webhook').item.json.body.service_area+'
Message: '+$('Webhook').item.json.body.message+'

Company Research:
'+$('Company Research (LLM)').item.json.choices[0].message.content}] }}

parameters.query: UPDATE sa_leads SET summary=$1, approach=$2, conversation_starters=$3, questions=$4, scenarios=$5, status='pending_draft' WHERE id=$6

options.queryReplacement: ={{ (() => { const raw = $json.choices[0].message.content; const m = raw.match(/```(?:json)?\s*([\s\S]*?)\s*```/); const jsonStr = (m ? m[1].trim() : raw.trim()); const a = JSON.parse(jsonStr); return [a.summary, a.approach, JSON.stringify(a.conversation_starters), JSON.stringify(a.questions), JSON.stringify(a.scenarios), $('Parse & Save Lead to PG').item.json.id]; })() }}

parameters.name: messages
parameters.value:
={{ [{role:'system',content:"You are writing on behalf of Robert Elder, CEO of Sovereign Advisory. Return ONLY a valid JSON object — no preamble, no explanation, no markdown. Your entire response must be pure JSON starting with { and ending with }. Fields: subject (string), body_text (plain text email, no HTML)."},{role:'user',content:'Prospect: '+$('Webhook').item.json.body.first_name+' '+$('Webhook').item.json.body.last_name+'
Company: '+$('Webhook').item.json.body.email.split('@').pop()+'
Message: '+$('Webhook').item.json.body.message+'

Strategic analysis:
'+$('AI Lead Analysis (LLM)').item.json.choices[0].message.content}] }}

parameters.query: INSERT INTO sa_lead_drafts (lead_id, subject, body_text, is_current) VALUES ($1,$2,$3,TRUE) RETURNING id

options.queryReplacement: ={{ (() => { const raw = $json.choices[0].message.content; const m = raw.match(/```(?:json)?\s*([\s\S]*?)\s*```/); const jsonStr = (m ? m[1].trim() : raw.trim()); const d = JSON.parse(jsonStr); return [$('Parse & Save Lead to PG').item.json.id, d.subject, d.body_text]; })() }}

parameters.query: UPDATE sa_leads SET notion_page_id=$1 WHERE id=$2
INSERT INTO sa_review_tokens (lead_id, n8n_resume_url) VALUES ($1, $2) RETURNING token
UPDATE sa_leads SET status='pending_review', draft_generated_at=NOW(), first_notified_at=NOW() WHERE id=$1

parameters.message:
=

New lead ready for review.

Name: {{ $('Webhook').item.json.body.first_name }} {{ $('Webhook').item.json.body.last_name }}
Email: {{ $('Webhook').item.json.body.email }}
Service: {{ $('Webhook').item.json.body.service_area }}

Review Lead
parameters.subject: ={{ 'New SA Lead: ' + $('Webhook').item.json.body.first_name + ' ' + $('Webhook').item.json.body.last_name + ' — ' + $('Webhook').item.json.body.service_area }}

={{ (() => { const raw = $('Generate Email Draft (LLM)').item.json.choices[0].message.content; const m = raw.match(/```[^`]*```/); const s = m ? m[0].replace(/```[^\n]*\n/, '').replace(/```$/, '').trim() : raw.trim(); return JSON.parse(s).subject; })() }}
parameters.text: ={{ (() => { const raw = $('Generate Email Draft (LLM)').item.json.choices[0].message.content; const m = raw.match(/```[^`]*```/); const s = m ? m[0].replace(/```[^\n]*\n/, '').replace(/```$/, '').trim() : raw.trim(); return JSON.parse(s).body_text; })() }}

parameters.query: UPDATE sa_leads SET status='sent', sent_at=NOW() WHERE id=$1

parameters.name: messages
parameters.value:
={{ [{role:'system',content:"You are writing on behalf of Robert Elder, CEO of Sovereign Advisory. Return ONLY a valid JSON object — no preamble, no explanation, no markdown. Your entire response must be pure JSON starting with { and ending with }. Fields: subject (string), body_text (plain text email, no HTML)."},{role:'user',content:'Original draft:
'+$('Generate Email Draft (LLM)').item.json.choices[0].message.content+'

Reviewer notes:
'+($json.notes||'')}] }}

parameters.query:
UPDATE sa_lead_drafts SET is_current=FALSE WHERE lead_id=$1;
INSERT INTO sa_lead_drafts (lead_id, version, subject, body_text, is_current) SELECT $1, COALESCE(MAX(version),0)+1, $2, $3, TRUE FROM sa_lead_drafts WHERE lead_id=$1;

options.queryReplacement: ={{ (() => { const raw = $('Re-run AI Analysis').item.json.choices[0].message.content; const m = raw.match(/```[^`]*```/); const s = m ? m[0].replace(/```[^\n]*\n/, '').replace(/```$/, '').trim() : raw.trim(); const d = JSON.parse(s); return [$('Parse & Save Lead to PG').item.json.id, d.subject, d.body_text]; })() }}
